name: Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 500 g Apples, peeled, cored and sliced thinly
59 1/8 ml Sugar mixed with 14 3/4 ml Ground cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling, salted water until just tender (about 10 minutes). Drain well and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
2. Add butter and mix until the butter is melted. Set aside.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine egg yolks, cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, orange peel, apples and raisins. Mix thoroughly.
4. Quickly beat egg whites until stiff. Fold the whites into the noodle mixture thoroughly.
5. Pour the noodle mixture into a greased 2 1/4 liter (2 1/2 quart) casserole dish. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the top.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 205°C (400°F) for 45 minutes.
7. Serve from the casserole, either hot or at room temperature. The kugel can be reheated in an oven set to 175°C (350°F) for 15 minutes.
